## Summary
Code review of src/cache_layer.py

## Performance Observations
In src/cache_layer.py, the `pickle.dump` function is used without specifying the protocol version. To prevent potential security vulnerabilities, use the highest protocol version available for pickling.

## Edge Cases
None found.

## Security & Correctness Issues
In src/cache_layer.py, the pickle module is used to load and save cached objects. However, the pickle module is not secure against erroneous or maliciously constructed data and can execute arbitrary code.
